text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 NYP: U.S. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. once said he cut off a dead raccoon’s genitals during a family road trip so he could “study them later,” according to a new biography citing his personal journals. The account adds to previously reported incidents involving animal carcasses, including his admission to dumping a dead bear cub in Central Park years earlier. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 NYP：据一本引用其个人日记的新传记显示，美国卫生部长小罗伯特·F·肯尼迪（Robert F. Kennedy Jr.）曾表示，他在一次家庭公路旅行中切下了一只死浣熊的生殖器，以便“以后研究”。这一说法增加了此前报道的涉及动物尸体的事件，包括他承认多年前在中央公园丢弃了一只死熊崽。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor China says this never happened, and it’s not the first time the president has made similar claims later denied by the other parties involved. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044607519985672529/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 中国表示这从未发生过，而且这已经不是总统第一次做出类似声明，随后又被其他相关方否认了。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044607519985672529/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from U.S. Southern Command (SOUTHCOM), earlier today, at the direction of SOUTHCOM Commander Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations earlier today in the Eastern Pacific. Per the release, the vessel was operating in known narco-trafficking routes and was engaged in trafficking. 3 narcotics-terrorists were killed in the strike. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国南方司令部（SOUTHCOM）发布的消息，今天早些时候，在南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万（Francis L. Donovan）将军的指挥下，南方之矛联合特遣部队在东太平洋对一艘由指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了打击。根据发布的消息，该船只在已知的毒品走私路线上航行并从事走私活动。打击中有3名毒品恐怖分子被击毙。推文

text: WarMonitor The Senate voted 40–59 to reject a resolution blocking arms sales to Israel, with all Republicans opposing it and most Democrats supporting it. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 参议院以40票对59票否决了一项阻止向以色列出售武器的决议，所有共和党人投了反对票，大多数民主党人投了支持票。推文

text: WarMonitor The administration has abruptly canceled an $11M contract with Catholic Charities to care for unaccompanied migrant children, ending a decades-long partnership with the Catholic Church. (Miami Herald) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044598324565586007/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 政府突然取消了与天主教慈善机构价值1100万美元的照顾无人陪伴移民儿童的合同，结束了与天主教会长达数十年的合作关系。（迈阿密先驱报）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044598324565586007/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor MTG says death threats against her children escalated after Trump labeled her a “traitor,” and alleges that when she contacted him, he showed no sympathy and blamed her, saying she’d be responsible if her son were killed. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044597170636992551/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor MTG表示，在特朗普称她为“叛徒”后，针对她孩子的死亡威胁升级了，并声称当她联系他时，他没有表现出任何同情，反而指责她，说如果她的儿子被杀，她要负责。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044597170636992551/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor The term “final solution” was the Nazi regime’s phrase for the systematic extermination of Jews during the Holocaust, so using it today carries direct associations with genocide. Stephen Miller almost says that Trump is seeking a "final solution" in Iran but then catches himself https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2044585207005692080/video/1 - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor “最终解决方案”一词是纳粹政权在大屠杀期间系统性灭绝犹太人的用语，因此今天使用它带有与种族灭绝的直接关联。Stephen Miller 差点说特朗普正在伊朗寻求“最终解决方案”，但随后意识到并改口了 https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2044585207005692080/video/1 - Aaron Rupar 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi thanked China for blocking a U.N. Security Council resolution on reopening the Strait of Hormuz during a call with his Chinese counterpart. He warned of “dangerous consequences” from U.S. actions in the Persian Gulf, while calling China’s veto, alongside Russia, effective in preventing escalation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi）在与中国外长通话时，感谢中国阻止了联合国安理会关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的决议。他警告称美国在波斯湾的行动将带来“危险后果”，同时称中国与俄罗斯的否决票在防止局势升级方面是有效的。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱The U.S. Senate voted against a motion to stop arms sales to Israel with 59 voting against and 40 in favour. @wfwithess" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 U.S. Senator Bernie Sanders on failed senate vote to stop U.S. arms sales to Israel: We are making progress. Today, more than 80% of the Democratic caucus stood with the American people and voted to block U.S. military aid to Netanyahu and his horrific, illegal wars. When we started this effort there were just 11 votes. Now, there are 40. That shift reflects where the American people are. Americans, whether they are Democrats, Republicans or Independents, want to see our tax money invested in improving lives here at home - not used to kill innocent women and children in the Middle East and put American troops in harm's way as part of Netanyahu's illegal wars of expansion. What's astonishing is that, despite overwhelming opposition across this country, Republicans continue to side with Netanyahu and Trump. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱美国参议院投票反对停止向以色列出售武器的动议，59票反对，40票赞成。@wfwithess” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 美国参议员伯尼·桑德斯（Bernie Sanders）就参议院未能通过停止向以色列出售美国武器的投票表示：我们正在取得进展。今天，超过80%的民主党核心小组成员与美国人民站在一起，投票阻止美国向内塔尼亚胡及其可怕的非法战争提供军事援助。当我们开始这项努力时，只有11票。现在，有40票。这种转变反映了美国人民的立场。美国人，无论是民主党人、共和党人还是独立人士，都希望看到我们的税款投资于改善国内生活——而不是用于在中东杀害无辜的妇女和儿童，并将美国军队置于危险之中，作为内塔尼亚胡非法扩张战争的一部分。令人震惊的是，尽管全国范围内存在压倒性的反对意见，共和党人仍然站在内塔尼亚胡和特朗普一边。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 WSJ: The Pentagon has begun discussions with major U.S. manufacturers, including companies like General Motors, Ford, GE Aerospace and Oshkosh, to boost weapons production as military demand rises. Talks are still preliminary but focus on using commercial factories, workforce, and industrial capacity to support the production of munitions and military equipment. The effort is aimed at investigating if commercial industry could boost the U.S. defence industrial base, which has been strained by ongoing conflicts, including the war in Iran and continued support for Ukraine. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 WSJ：五角大楼已开始与通用汽车、福特、GE航空和奥什科什等美国主要制造商进行讨论，以随着军事需求的增加提高武器产量。谈判仍处于初步阶段，但重点是利用商业工厂、劳动力和工业能力来支持弹药和军事装备的生产。此举旨在调查商业工业是否能提振美国国防工业基础，该基础因持续的冲突（包括伊朗战争和对乌克兰的持续支持）而承受压力。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Fox News’ Jennifer Griffin has confirmed Iran used a Chinese spy satellite to monitor U.S. bases in the Middle East last month after the IRGC gained access shortly after launch. https://x.com/Acyn/status/2044546090155053504/video/1 tweet

text: "We are all hostages of this apocalyptic death cult." Pepe Escobar on Ben-Gvir praying at Al-Aqsa and the building momentum toward a Third Temple false flag. Egypt and Jordan, won't lift a finger. "They are preparing the terrain for a false flag to destroy Al-Aqsa. The only way to prevent it would be a devastating military victory against Israel—arrest all these people, install a war crimes tribunal. We have to find a solution, but I won't go as far as inserting the adjective final, but we have to find a solution for them...." FULL EPISODE !! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: “我们都是这个末日死亡邪教的人质。” Pepe Escobar 谈论本-格维尔（Ben-Gvir）在阿克萨清真寺祈祷以及建立第三圣殿假旗行动的势头。埃及和约旦不会动一根手指。“他们正在为摧毁阿克萨清真寺的假旗行动准备地形。防止它的唯一方法是对以色列取得毁灭性的军事胜利——逮捕所有这些人，设立战争罪法庭。我们必须找到一个解决方案，但我不会走得太远去插入‘最终’这个形容词，但我们必须为他们找到一个解决方案……” 完整剧集！！🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 TankerTrackers: A non-Iranian VLCC supertanker, capable of carrying around “2 million barrels” of crude and sanctioned by the US OFAC, has entered Iranian waters via the Strait of Hormuz with AIS active. The movement was identified and verified through…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 TankerTrackers: A tanker belonging to Iran successfully passed through the blockade, transiting the Strait of Hormuz today. Several sanction complaint tankers have steered towards Iraq with their AIS transponders off, away from the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 TankerTrackers：一艘非伊朗籍的VLCC超级油轮，能够运载约‘200万桶’原油，并受到美国OFAC制裁，已在AIS开启的情况下通过霍尔木兹海峡进入伊朗水域。该动向已通过……识别并核实” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 TankerTrackers：一艘属于伊朗的油轮今天成功通过封锁，穿过了霍尔木兹海峡。几艘符合制裁规定的油轮已关闭AIS应答器，避开封锁，驶向伊拉克。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 "Extending the ceasefire is not in our interest at all. I am absolutely not in favor of a ceasefire." Mohsen Rezaei: We must shorten the days. We must intensify the pressure. Right now, our brothers have aimed the launchers at the Abraham Lincoln and all the vesselsm all the vessels are now under our launchers. "We will sink all of them. We won't let a single one escape from us." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “延长停火根本不符合我们的利益。我绝对不支持停火。” 莫森·雷扎伊（Mohsen Rezaei）：我们必须缩短天数。我们必须加强压力。现在，我们的兄弟已经将发射器对准了亚伯拉罕·林肯号和所有的船只，所有的船只现在都在我们的发射器之下。“我们将击沉它们所有人。我们不会让任何一个从我们手中逃脱。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor The Pentagon is quietly reaching out to GM, Ford, and other major manufacturers about ramping up U.S. weapons production, a sign it’s preparing for a much larger, sustained buildup. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044577890243579959/photo/1 tweet

text: OSINTtechnical The Pentagon has approached Ford and General Motors about restarting production of weapons and other military equipment — WSJ The DOD is interested in enlisting the companies to use their personnel and factory capacity to increase production of munitions and other equipment. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044575301271687327/photo/1 tweet

text: 🇾🇪 🇺🇸 The USS George HW Bush aircraft carrier afraid to be confronted by AnsarAllah (Houthi’s) in Yemen had to travel from Southern Africa en route to Iran US military spent over $1 billion dollars during Operation Rough Rider to no avail. Fast forward one year later and AnsarAllah (Houthi’s) are stronger and more resilient than ever before! “$200 million dollars worth of missiles spent in first 3 weeks of that operation (Rough Rider) . US lost 7 MQ-9 reaper drones each worth $30 million dollars a piece, two FA-18 jets worth $15 million dollars each. CENTCOM hit more than 1,000 targets using these weapons and yet the Houthi’s survived and now threatening to disrupt global shipping by closing the Bab Al Mandab strait..”
text_zh: 🇾🇪 🇺🇸 乔治·HW·布什号航空母舰因害怕在也门与安萨尔真主（胡塞武装）对抗，不得不从南非出发前往伊朗。美国军方在“粗暴骑手行动”（Operation Rough Rider）中花费了超过10亿美元，但无济于事。快进一年后，安萨尔真主（胡塞武装）比以往任何时候都更强大、更具韧性！“在那次行动（粗暴骑手）的前3周花费了价值2亿美元的导弹。美国损失了7架MQ-9收割者无人机，每架价值3000万美元，两架FA-18喷气式飞机，每架价值1500万美元。中央司令部使用这些武器打击了1000多个目标，但胡塞武装幸存了下来，现在正威胁通过关闭曼德海峡来扰乱全球航运……”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺The Russian Ministry of Defence has released a list of companies that produce drones for Ukraine under joint production agreements signed between Ukraine and several European countries on March 26th. text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺俄罗斯国防部发布了一份根据3月26日乌克兰与几个欧洲国家签署的联合生产协议为乌克兰生产无人机的公司名单。莫斯科称此举是蓄意升级……” ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 前俄罗斯总统梅德韦杰夫警告称，国防部公布的名单应被字面理解为潜在目标名单。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Early warning alerts are in effect in the Shomron region, the West Bank. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 西岸地区（Shomron region）已生效早期预警警报。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 The Russian Ministry of Defence has released a list of companies that produce drones for Ukraine under joint production agreements signed between Ukraine and several European countries on March 26th. Moscow described the move as a deliberate escalation that could worsen the military-political situation across Europe and turn European countries into a strategic rear base for Ukraine. They warned that potential drone strikes on Russian territory using systems produced in Europe could lead to unpredictable consequences. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 俄罗斯国防部发布了一份根据3月26日乌克兰与几个欧洲国家签署的联合生产协议为乌克兰生产无人机的公司名单。莫斯科称此举是蓄意升级，可能恶化整个欧洲的军事政治局势，并将欧洲国家变成乌克兰的战略后方基地。他们警告称，使用欧洲生产的系统对俄罗斯领土进行潜在的无人机袭击可能导致不可预知的后果。@wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah resistance fighters target Israeli troops gathered on tne outskirts of Bint Jbeil
text_zh: 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党抵抗战士瞄准了聚集在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）郊区的以色列军队

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender RT @HM_Int3lligence : Chinese President Xi Jinping met with Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov this week, describing the relationship between China and Russia as "precious" and calling for deeper cooperation between the two countries. During the meeting, Lavrov offered to increase Russia's energy supplies to China to help offset disruptions caused by the Iran war, including shipping constraints through the Strait of Hormuz. Russian President Vladimir Putin is also expected to visit China soon. China has positioned itself as a stabilizing force amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, with several world leaders meeting Xi this week, including Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez, Abu Dhabi's Crown Prince Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan and Vietnamese leader To Lam. Gulf countries are reportedly hoping China will use its influence over Iran to reduce attacks on neighboring countries and bring Tehran to the negotiation table. Dylan Loh, an associate professor at Singapore's Nanyang Technological University, noted that China holds leverage over Iran and there are growing expectations that it will use that influence more directly. Source: AFP, AP, Reuters So What The Iran situation is likely highly beneficial for Russia, particularly in terms of energy sales to India and China. While China has attempted to position itself as a stabilizing force in the region, it is highly unlikely to deploy military assets in numbers large enough to deter the United States. A more probable course of action is that China will continue to supply Iran with weapons and equipment, with the intention of drawing the US further into another Middle East conflict. Regardless of China's approach, this is unlikely to have a significant impact on American decision-making. Follow us to join the intelligence community! #HMIntelligence #HM #Iran #US #China tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender RT @HM_Int3lligence ：中国国家主席习近平本周会见了俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫（Sergei Lavrov），称中俄关系“珍贵”，并呼吁两国深化合作。在会晤中，拉夫罗夫提议增加俄罗斯对中国的能源供应，以帮助抵消伊朗战争造成的供应中断，包括通过霍尔木兹海峡的航运限制。预计俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京（Vladimir Putin）也将很快访问中国。中国已将自己定位为中东持续冲突中的稳定力量，本周有多位世界领导人会见了习近平，包括西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯（Pedro Sanchez）、阿布扎比王储穆罕默德·本·扎耶德·阿勒纳哈扬（Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan）和越南领导人苏林（To Lam）。据报道，海湾国家希望中国利用其对伊朗的影响力来减少对邻国的袭击，并将德黑兰带到谈判桌前。新加坡南洋理工大学副教授 Dylan Loh 指出，中国对伊朗拥有影响力，人们越来越期待它能更直接地利用这种影响力。来源：法新社、美联社、路透社 那么，伊朗局势可能对俄罗斯非常有利，特别是在对印度和中国的能源销售方面。虽然中国试图将自己定位为该地区的稳定力量，但它极不可能部署足够数量的军事资产来威慑美国。一个更可能的行动方针是，中国将继续向伊朗提供武器和装备，意图将美国进一步拖入另一场中东冲突。无论中国采取什么方针，这都不太可能对美国的决策产生重大影响。关注我们加入情报社区！#HMIntelligence #HM #Iran #US #China 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Israeli megadonor Miriam Adelson gives $40 million to Republican super PACs for midterm elections. https://www.disclose.tv/id/joc9s8lb3z/ tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 以色列超级捐赠者米里亚姆·阿德尔森（Miriam Adelson）向共和党超级政治行动委员会捐赠了4000万美元用于中期选举。https://www.disclose.tv/id/joc9s8lb3z/ 推文

text: Disclose.tv ICYMI - OpenAI's Sam Altman warns that the next AI models could be misused by terrorist groups to create novel pathogens, "that's no longer a theoretical thing, or it's not going to be for much longer," and agrees that there could be a "world shaking cyber attack this year." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044559681226494130/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 错过了吗 - OpenAI 的萨姆·奥特曼（Sam Altman）警告称，下一代人工智能模型可能被恐怖组织滥用以制造新型病原体，“这不再是一件理论上的事情，或者很快就不会是了”，并同意今年可能会发生“震撼世界的网络攻击”。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044559681226494130/video/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command Today, Adm. Brad Cooper, CENTCOM commander, completed his second trip to the Middle East in the last 15 days. He engaged regional partners in six different countries and visited with U.S. troops. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044559393778512150/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 今天，中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀（Brad Cooper）海军上将完成了他在过去15天内的第二次中东之行。他与六个不同国家的区域伙伴进行了接触，并探望了美国军队。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044559393778512150/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index The Pentagon has approached automakers General Motors and Ford about shifting some capacity to 'make arms and military supplies', according to Wall Street Journal. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据《华尔街日报》报道，五角大楼已接触汽车制造商通用汽车和福特，商讨将部分产能转移到“制造武器和军事物资”。推文

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区已激活无人机警报警报器。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CENTCOM has released the radio message relayed to vessels in the area warning them to abide by the naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 中央司令部发布了转发给该地区船只的无线电信息，警告他们遵守霍尔木兹海峡的海军封锁。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 NBC: The U.S. didn't ask for a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah during negotiations on Tuesday, but a U.S. official did empahses that the U.S. wants to see a durable peace between the two. “This is not something we have asked for, nor is it part of the peace negotiations with Iran, but the president would welcome the end of hostilities in Lebanon as part of a peace agreement between Israel and Lebanon. The United States’ focus is on building trust between the two governments so that we can create space for a peace deal and so that any future understandings can be durable. Both sides need to build political momentum.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 NBC：美国在周二的谈判中没有要求以色列和真主党停火，但一位美国官员强调，美国希望看到两者之间实现持久和平。“这不是我们所要求的，也不是与伊朗和平谈判的一部分，但总统欢迎黎巴嫩敌对行动的结束，作为以色列和黎巴嫩和平协议的一部分。美国的重点是在两国政府之间建立信任，以便我们能够为和平协议创造空间，并使未来的任何谅解都能持久。双方都需要建立政治势头。” @wfwitness

text: Instant News Alerts NEW: The Pentagon has approached automakers and other American manufacturers about playing a larger role in weapons production. (WSJ) tweet
text_zh: Instant News Alerts 最新消息：五角大楼已接触汽车制造商和其他美国制造商，商讨在武器生产中发挥更大作用。（WSJ）推文

text: ELINT News RT @NatashaBertrand : Iran’s new national security chief Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr's views "were so extreme that one of his subordinates—Qassem Soleimani, the notorious Quds Force leader later killed by the U.S.—temporarily quit in protest." WSJ: Iran’s Regime Has Changed—for the Worse The U.S.-Israeli attack fast-tracked the ascent of hard-liners and apocalyptic religious followers https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/iran-radical-regime-change-a42d96ea tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @NatashaBertrand ：伊朗新任国家安全首长穆罕默德·巴格尔·佐尔卡德尔（Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr）的观点“非常极端，以至于他的下属之一——后来被美国杀死的臭名昭著的圣城旅领导人卡西姆·苏莱曼尼（Qassem Soleimani）——曾一度抗议辞职。” WSJ：伊朗政权已经改变——变得更糟了。美以袭击加速了强硬派和末日宗教追随者的崛起 https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/iran-radical-regime-change-a42d96ea 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷Mehr: Iran has suspended petrochemical exports for a period in order to stabilize the domestic market. They specified that this doesn't include crude oil. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Admin note: This comes as Israeli airstrikes targeted key producers of these goods with significant damage to major facilities in the South Pars region, including Mahshahr, Bandar Imam, and Asaluyeh. Petrochemicals constitute nearly 33% of Iran's total non-oil exports and are the second-largest source of revenue after crude oil. Roughly 85% of Iran's petrochemical export capacity was disabled due to the aforementioned strikes on major hubs, leaving only 10%–15% operational. Previously, Iran boasted a nominal production capacity near 95 million tons per year. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷Mehr：伊朗已暂停石化产品出口一段时间，以稳定国内市场。他们明确表示这不包括原油。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 管理员注：这是因为以色列空袭了这些商品的关键生产商，对南帕尔斯地区的主要设施造成了重大破坏，包括马赫沙赫尔（Mahshahr）、伊玛目港（Bandar Imam）和阿萨鲁耶（Asaluyeh）。石化产品占伊朗非石油出口总额的近33%，是继原油之后的第二大收入来源。由于上述对主要枢纽的打击，伊朗约85%的石化出口能力被瘫痪，仅剩10%–15%在运营。此前，伊朗的名义生产能力接近每年9500万吨。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Mehr: Iran has suspended petrochemical exports for a period in order to stabilize the domestic market. They specified that this doesn't include crude oil. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Mehr：伊朗已暂停石化产品出口一段时间，以稳定国内市场。他们明确表示这不包括原油。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ABC: U.S. and Iranian negotiators have been communicating through direct, as well as indirect, channels since the end of negotiations in Islamabad. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ABC：自伊斯兰堡谈判结束以来，美国和伊朗的谈判代表一直通过直接和间接渠道进行沟通。@wfwitness
